title: Anomaly Detection

frontmatter.title: Anomaly Detection
frontmatter.description: The certifiable competency of reading telemetry, separating signal from noise, and isolating real anomalies — then correlating them toward a validated root cause.

body:
# Skill · Anomaly Detection

A core intelligence competency: the agent can turn raw telemetry into trustworthy anomaly signals —
detecting deviations, suppressing noise, and correlating findings across signals to diagnose cause.

## Conferred by
- [NETINT-101](../schools/network-intelligence/departments/observability/courses/netint-101.md)
- [NETINT-210](../schools/network-intelligence/departments/observability/courses/netint-210.md)
- [NETINT-310](../schools/network-intelligence/departments/root-cause/courses/netint-310.md)

## Examined by
[Network Intelligence Exam](../benchmarks/netint-exam.md).

## Maps to certification
Required for [Network Intelligence — Gold](../certifications/network-intelligence-gold.md).
